backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to project files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for all frontend files used in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point defining SEO title, meta description, and mounting root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component composing all site sections into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: Contact form with validation, success state, and local-only submission behavior.
frontend/src/components/sections/About.t: About section with mission statement and feature cards using icon components.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section showing contact details and embedding the contact form.
Footer with logo, quick links, contact info, social icons, and dynamic year.
frontend/src/components/sections/Hero.ts: Hero section with headline, description, CTA buttons, and a banner image featuring smooth scrolling links.
Responsive navbar with desktop and mobile menus, smooth scrolling, and Internet Identity logo.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Services section displaying a grid of cards describing three offerings with icons.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Testimonials section rendering client quotes in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, invalidating queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file noting no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles, custom OKLCH color variables, dark mode settings, and global accessibility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point wiring React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the app.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with custom colors, typography, container queries, animations, and extended theme settings.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s current state, including schema version, feature list, image requirements, and pending requests. Defines existing implemented features and outlines required generated assets for a business website.
